About

Where precision meets entrepreneurial vision

I'm Dario, based in Schaan, Liechtenstein. From thinking different at Apple, to co-founding AI-powered startups, shipping apps across every major Apple platform and writing my debut book — I'm drawn to where technology, creativity and human experience converge.

I believe the time to act is always now.
